The Vault v0.2.7 finishes the Local Agents workflow and removes the old Recall Console from the desktop shell.

Highlights:
- Removes the Recall Console primary navigation path and deletes the unused ChatView surface.
- Renames the Vault Agent workbench surface to Local Agents.
- Adds a local-agent run lifecycle for prepared, launched, and completed Codex or Claude terminal runs.
- Adds Start Codex / Start Claude terminal actions from trusted project repository paths.
- Tracks local run status, timestamps, terminal process IDs, result summaries, and saved memory links.
- Surfaces local agent runs in Queue overview separately from Vault background tasks.
- Saves completed local terminal outcomes back into Vault memory from the Local Agents flow.

This build packages the desktop app and the bundled `vault-memory` MCP sidecar runtime. After installing, open The Vault and use Settings -> Client setup to connect Codex, Claude Desktop, or Claude Code.
